security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: https://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: Unified installer for the Roomler node stack. Pick the device's role (be accessed as a background service, per-user, attended — or reach others only as a tunnel client); the wizard detects existing installs, downloads the matching artifact through roomler.ai's proxy, installs it, and enrolls the device against the configured Roomler server. No terminal commands required.
